rationale: Educ. Code §28.056 governs teacher award and reimbursement applications. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. No conflict exists.
quote: To obtain an award or reimbursement for training expenses under the program, a teacher must submit to the board a written application in a form, manner, and time prescribed by the commissioner.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this teacher reimbursement provision.
